---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, capability, or enhancement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

A clear description of the problem or workflow that's currently painful or impossible. Avoid jumping to a solution — describe the user need first.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Be as concrete as you can:

- Which tool(s) should change, or new tool(s) needed
- Sketch of inputs/outputs
- How it should compose with existing tools

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds you've tried, and why they don't work well enough.

## Additional context

- Links to MCP spec sections, Grid Connect API docs, or related issues
- Example from another MCP server or tool that does this well
- Whether this blocks production use or is a nice-to-have
